recommended.song_name: All I Wanna Do Is Make Love To You

content:
[Verse]

[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
